---
title: "Day 10: Causal Inference in Panels and TWFE"
author: "Robert W. Walker"
date: "07/31/2026"
categories: [panel data, code, analysis]
image: "image.jpg"
---

## Slides

- [A reveal presentation](https://robertwwalker.github.io/Essex26-2J-Slides/ESSSSDA26-Day10/)

## Wrapping Up


## Difference in Difference

- [A nice tracker of DiD packages for R](https://asjadnaqvi.github.io/DiD/)

- [A nice exploration of the two-way Mundlak model by Badi Baltagi](https://surface.syr.edu/cgi/viewcontent.cgi?article=1469&context=cpr)
